title: Fixed Facebook group post button selector with 6 fallback strategies
summary: Debugged H&H Facebook group posting script that was failing with "Post button not found" errors. Identified that the anchored regex /^post$/i was too strict for Facebook's varying button labels. Added 6 fallback selectors plus Ctrl+Enter keyboard shortcut as last resort. Script was successfully posting to joined groups (Property in Spain for sale, Spanish Homes In The Sun, Property for sale in Spain) while correctly skipping groups H&H is not a member of.
decisions: Replace anchored /^post$/i selector with 6 fallback selectors + Ctrl+Enter keyboard shortcut
Skip groups not in Facebook share dialog (H&H not a member) rather than treating as errors
Let running session finish with old code; fix applies to next run
ideas: Bump share dialog wait from 3s to 4-5s to reduce "Share to a group not found in dropdown" failures

title: Fixed Facebook group post button selectors with fallback strategy
